title: Finding / Note
description: Context discovered along the way — facts, gotchas, data realities, method limits — so a later agent doesn't have to rediscover it. NOT a decision (that's an ADR).

category.description: discovery=fact learned · gotcha=trap · data=dataset reality · method=how-to + its limits · source=a source's shape · risk=a way this can mislead/fail · context=general.

body_md.description: The finding in full, incl. limits/caveats.

status.description: standing = still true; superseded = replaced by a newer note.

relates_to.description: task/adr/feat this came from or informs.
